assertions.name: MenuItem entry point
assertions.text: Has [MenuItem("Tools/Frame Debugger/Capture All Events")] entry point
assertions.evidence: Line 73: [MenuItem("Tools/Frame Debugger/Capture All Events")] attribute is present on static method CaptureAllEvents().

assertions.name: EditorApplication.update state machine
assertions.text: Uses EditorApplication.update as the tick mechanism with a state machine (Phase 1: wait for events, Phase 2: iterate with limit, Phase 3: cleanup)
assertions.evidence: Line 114: EditorApplication.update += OnCapturePoll is used, but there is no explicit 3-phase state machine (no state enum, no phase-based branching). Instead, a single stability-detection heuristic polls frame count changes (lines 137-154) and jumps directly to cleanup/extraction when stable. The conceptual phases are hard-coded into separate methods rather than modeled as a state machine.

assertions.name: Per-event limit and frame wait
assertions.text: Sets limit per event (limit = targetIndex + 1) and waits one frame before reading GetFrameEventData
assertions.evidence: Frame limit is set once as a constant (DEFAULT_FRAME_LIMIT = 100, line 65) rather than per event as 'targetIndex + 1'. Inside ProcessAllFrames (lines 220-245), JumpToFrame(frameIndex) is called and GetFrameEventData is read immediately on the same iteration — there is no one-frame wait between jumping to a frame and reading its event data.

assertions.name: RFC 4180 CSV escaping
assertions.text: Outputs CSV with proper RFC 4180 escaping (quotes fields containing commas, newlines, or double-quotes)
assertions.evidence: EscapeCsv method (lines 536-551) checks for commas, double-quotes, \n, and \r, and wraps the value in double-quotes while doubling any embedded double-quotes, following RFC 4180.

assertions.name: Cleanup on capture complete
assertions.text: Removes EditorApplication.update handler and disables FrameDebugger when capture completes
assertions.evidence: Line 168: EditorApplication.update -= OnCapturePoll removes the handler. Lines 183-184: FrameDebugger.enabled = false disables the FrameDebugger in the finally block of CleanupPoll.
